prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约9916→11542→15373→14879→12959，整体呈先降后升走势；2023年因，2024年小幅回升至148 79，2025年进一步回升至12959，近两年累计前移约2414名，显示报考热度回升；2021–2025年物理类计划分别为67→68→71→71→76人，逐年小幅扩招；2026年计划87人，较2025年增加11人（+14.5%），扩招幅度明显，理论上降低录取门槛。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东华大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名从2021年第81位持续 上升至2026年第72位，排名稳步提升，反映综合实力增强；东华大学近年无明显负面舆情事件；抖音热度排名第96、评价为“一般”，短视频平台曝光量处于中等 水平，未出现爆款传播事件，报考关注度平稳；第五轮学科评估中材料科学与工程获评A级，为该校唯一A-及以上学科；纺织科学与工程为传统王牌但未在评估 数据中体现A级；材料类招生专业对应“双一流”学科，对相关方向考生有吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等热门专业社会热度持续偏高，东 华大学在上述领域均有招生，有助于吸引高分考生；辽宁省2026年高考报名总人数约20万（较2025年物理类14.3万大幅增加），竞争加剧；东华大学位于上海市，对辽宁考生具有较强地域吸引力；该校在辽宁招生占比约2–3%，属跨省招生正常比例。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次回升趋势、2026年大幅扩招（+14.5%）降低门槛、辽宁省考生总数明显增加加剧竞争、学校排名持续上升增强吸引力等因素，扩招效应与考生增加效应部分对冲；，考虑扩招幅度较大适度下调，预测2026年物理类最低位次约14034名，区间13534–14534名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 9916 → 11542 → 15373 → 14879 → 12959, showing an overall trend of first decreasing and then increasing; in 2023, due to [reason not specified], it slightly rebounded to 14879 in 2024, and further recovered to 12959 in 2025, with a cumulative advance of about 2414 places in the last two years, indicating a recovery in application popularity; from 2021 to 2025, the enrollment plans for Physics Category were 67 → 68 → 71 → 71 → 76, with a gradual small expansion each year; the 2026 plan is 87, an increase of 11 (+14.5%) compared to 2025, a significant expansion, theoretically lowering the admission threshold.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Donghua University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 81st in 2021 to 72nd in 2026, reflecting enhanced comprehensive strength; there have been no significant negative public opinion incidents in recent years; its Douyin popularity ranking is 96th, with a rating of 'average', indicating moderate exposure on short video platforms and stable application attention; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Materials Science and Engineering was rated A-level, the only A- or above discipline at the university; Textile Science and Engineering is a traditional strong point but not reflected as A-level in the evaluation data; the Materials category enrollment major corresponds to the 'Double First-Class' discipline, attracting candidates interested in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity; Donghua University offers enrollment in these fields, helping to attract high-scoring candidates; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Liaoning Gaokao is about 200,000 (a significant increase from 143,000 in the 2025 Physics Category), intensifying competition; Donghua University is located in Shanghai, which has strong regional appeal for Liaoning candidates; the university's enrollment proportion in Liaoning is about 2–3%, a normal proportion for cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the upward trend in 2025 rankings, the significant expansion in 2026 (+14.5%) lowering the threshold, the notable increase in the total number of candidates in Liaoning intensifying competition, and the continuous rise in the university's ranking enhancing attractiveness, the expansion effect and the candidate increase effect partially offset each other; given the relatively large expansion, a moderate downward adjustment is made, predicting the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 to be approximately 14034, with a range of 13534–14534.

- Management Science and Engineering Category (Information Management and Information Systems, E-commerce, Supply Chain Management)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 14034, range 13534–14534. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of 13534 can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular majors such as Computer Category, Artificial Intelligence, and Electronic Information Category; those around 14000 are advised to target Tier 2 majors like Mathematics Category, Physics Category, and Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering as the main direction; those near the upper limit of 14534 are advised to secure Tier 3 majors such as Materials Category and Textile Engineering (Double First-Class disciplines) as safety options, while also considering relatively low-threshold majors like Management Science and Engineering Category.

prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东华大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名从2021年第81位持续上升至2026年 第72位，综合实力稳步增强，对文科考生亦有品牌吸引力；东华大学近年无明显负面舆情事件；抖音热度排名第96、评价为“一般”，报考关注度平稳，未出现异 常波动；东华大学A级学科（材料科学与工程）为理工科方向，历史类招生专业（经济管理试验班、经济与贸易类、社会科学试验班、新闻传播学类）无直接对 应的A级学科支撑，学科优势对文科考生吸引力有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 经济管理类社会热度分化观望，金融/财经/经济分化观望；新闻传播类社会热度明显劝退（受张雪 峰言论影响显著）；法学推荐但东华大学法学属社会科学试验班大类；辽宁省2026年高考报名总人数约20万，历史类占比近年约25–30%（估算约5–6万人），；东华大学位于上海市，对辽宁文科考生具有较强地域吸 引力；该校在辽宁历史类招生人数少（12–13人），属小规模招生。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历史类位次近两年小幅前移趋势、2026年持续缩招（-7.7%）加剧竞争、考生总数增加、 新闻传播类明显劝退影响部分专业报考热度等因素；，考虑缩招效应适度上调，预测2026年历史类最低位次约2093名，区间1716–2470名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 1570 → 1864 → 2304 → 2261 → 2173, showing an overall backward trend; from 2021 to 2023, it moved backward year by year (1570 → 1864 → 2304), slightly moved forward to 2261 in 2024, and further moved forward to 2173 in 2025, with a cumulative forward movement of about 131 places in the last two years, indicating a slight recovery in application popularity but with limited magnitude; from 2021 to 2025, the History Category enrollment plans were 21 → 20 → 21 → 19 → 13 respectively, with a significant reduction to 13 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 12, a further reduction of 1 (-7.7%) compared to 2025, with continuous enrollment reduction intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Donghua University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science main ranking has continuously risen from 81st in 2021 to 72nd in 2026, with steadily enhanced comprehensive strength, which also has brand appeal for liberal arts candidates; Donghua University has had no significant negative public opinion incidents in recent years; its Douyin popularity ranking is 96th, rated as 'average', with stable application attention and no abnormal fluctuations; Donghua University's A-level discipline (Materials Science and Engineering) is in the science and engineering direction, while the History Category enrollment majors (Economic Management Pilot Class, Economics and Trade Class, Social Science Pilot Class, Journalism and Communication Class) have no directly corresponding A-level discipline support, so the disciplinary advantage has limited appeal for liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social heat for Economic Management majors is divided and wait-and-see; Finance/Economics/Economics are divided and wait-and-see; Journalism and Communication majors have obvious social discouragement (significantly affected by Zhang Xuefeng's remarks); Law is recommended but Donghua University's Law belongs to the Social Science Pilot Class category; the total number of candidates registered for the 2026 Liaoning Gaokao is about 200,000, with the History Category proportion in recent years about 25–30% (estimated about 50,000–60,000); Donghua University is located in Shanghai, which has strong regional attraction for Liaoning liberal arts candidates; the university's enrollment in Liaoning History Category is small (12–13 people), belonging to small-scale enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the slight forward trend of History Category rankings in the last two years, the continuous enrollment reduction in 2026 (-7.7%) intensifying competition, the increase in total candidates, and the obvious discouragement of Journalism and Communication majors affecting some major application popularity, etc.; considering the enrollment reduction effect, moderately adjust upward, predicting the 2026 History Category minimum ranking to be approximately 2093, with a range of 1716–2470.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 2093, range 1716–2470. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of 1716 can aim for Tier 1 Social Science Pilot Class (Law direction) and Economic Management Pilot Class; candidates with rankings around 2000 are recommended to focus on Tier 2 Economics and Trade Class; candidates with rankings near the upper limit of 2470 can consider Tier 3 Journalism and Communication Class as a safety option, but note that this major has obvious social discouragement, and employment prospects need careful evaluation.
